evals.prompt: Review this App Router route tree and explain where the client boundary should sit and whether the route files are too heavy.
evals.expected_output: A review that keeps route files thin, narrows 'use client' boundaries, and pushes reusable UI or feature logic out of route entry files.
assertions: The response treats Server Components as the default
The response narrows client boundaries instead of moving whole route trees to the client
The response discusses route-file thinness or feature extraction

evals.prompt: Choose the framework integrations for a Next.js App Router app that uses MUI and needs localization.
evals.expected_output: Guidance that prefers the official MUI and Next.js integration, prefers next-intl for localization, and keeps package manager usage on Yarn for the Node-based app workflow.
assertions: The response mentions the official MUI and Next.js integration path
The response recommends next-intl for Next-specific localization
The response keeps Yarn as the preferred package manager for the Node-based app
